config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, individual rights are the foundation that protects people from being sacrificed for some vague idea of the common good. Society matters, but it should be built by respecting each person's dignity and freedom, not by overriding them whenever it is convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, pengalaman sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kepentingan umum” dibiarkan mengalahkan hak dasar, itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu fondasi agar masyarakat tetap adil dan tidak mengorbankan kelompok yang lemah. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak-hak yang tidak boleh dilanggar seenaknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of thinking can easily slide into paternalism, mob pressure, or abuse by authorities. Public order and the common good matter, but they should not be a blank check to silence dissent, punish minorities, or ignore basic rights like free expression and due process. A healthy society is not built by sacrificing individuals whenever it is convenient; it is built by protecting people strongly enough that they can trust the system and contribute freely. If anything, society becomes stronger when individual rights are treated as limits on power, not obstacles to it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, kami punya banyak contoh ketika alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan wewenang, jadi saya sangat curiga pada klaim yang memberi prioritas mutlak pada masyarakat. Hak individu bukan musuh masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah menginjak orang yang lemah. Kepentingan sosial penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan seenaknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should take blanket priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to order, harmony, or the common good can be used to pressure people into silence and let authorities or majorities overreach. Of course society needs rules and shared obligations, but those should be limited by rights that protect people from arbitrary treatment, especially minorities and dissenters. If individual rights are treated as secondary whenever it is convenient, then “society” becomes just a polite word for power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara otomatis di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya cenderung curiga pada argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” karena dalam sejarah kami itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi, penindasan, dan perluasan kuasa negara. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru hak-hak itu yang melindungi minoritas dan orang yang tidak punya kuasa dari tekanan mayoritas. Masyarakat memang perlu aturan dan tanggung jawab bersama, tetapi kalau hak dasar bisa disisihkan kapan saja, maka yang tersisa bukan kebaikan umum, melainkan kekuasaan yang tak terkendali.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
